request: Fix continuation reconciliation so resumed executed run-graph receipts recompute downstream dispatch preview from current task/doc state. Specifically, when a specification lane has already executed and later the design doc is finalized and spec/work-pool/dev tasks close, vida taskflow consume continue must refresh downstream blockers/ready state instead of preserving stale pending_specification_evidence, pending_design_finalize, and pending_spec_task_close blockers. Scope this bounded unit to runtime dispatch / taskflow resume logic plus targeted tests. Proof target: cargo test -p vida refresh_downstream_dispatch_preview -- --nocapture and cargo test -p vida taskflow_consume_resume -- --nocapture
